overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rainy, foggy Night City at night. The player travels from Coastview into Dogtown, passing under large industrial structures and past neon-lit landmarks including a holographic pyramid and giant digital billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban street in Coastview district

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stationary position, speed increasing

agents.ego_description: driving through rainy streets following a vehicle with red tail lights ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic vehicle with glowing red tail lights driving ahead on the same road

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with illuminated circular gauges and purple accent lighting
tall vertical green light beam piercing through the fog in the distance
dark silhouetted damaged industrial buildings against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view from inside a vehicle in the Coastview district, accelerating along a rainy urban street. The dashboard glows with purple and white lights while a vehicle with red tail lights drives ahead. A distinctive vertical green beam is visible in the foggy distance, and industrial ruins line the right side of the road.

events.description: location text changes from Coastview to Dogtown, entering new district
passing under large overhead industrial structure with bright spotlights

agents.ego_description: driving under a massive industrial overpass structure with metal framework

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead continuing under the overpass, maintaining distance

entered.detail: massive metal framework structure with bright spotlights spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters Dogtown and passes beneath a massive industrial overpass with bright spotlights. The location text indicates the district change. Rain continues to fall as the vehicle drives under the metal framework structure, with the vehicle ahead still visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with heavy rain and green neon lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from blue-purple to green, heavy rain becomes more visible on windshield
large neon pyramid structure and holographic billboard come into view on the right

agents.ego_description: driving through heavy rain with reduced visibility, approaching neon landmarks

entered.detail: large geometric pyramid structure with glowing green neon wireframe edges
tall vertical digital billboard displaying imagery, partially obscured by rain

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens into a wide area with distinct green ambient lighting and heavy rain. The vehicle ahead is no longer visible. A striking neon pyramid structure and a large holographic billboard emerge on the right side, becoming prominent landmarks in this foggy, rain-soaked environment.

events.description: vehicle slows down while passing alongside the pyramid structure

agents.ego_description: driving past the neon pyramid and alongside the large holographic billboard with a face

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the heavy rain, passing closely by the glowing green pyramid structure and driving alongside a massive holographic billboard displaying a face. The green ambient lighting dominates the scene as the vehicle slows, with urban ruins visible in the background through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy urban landscape that transforms from the industrial outskirts of Coastview into the neon-drenched atmosphere of Dogtown. It begins with the vehicle accelerating along a wet street, guided by a glowing purple dashboard and a distant vertical green beam piercing through the fog. As the car pushes forward, the scene shifts beneath a massive industrial overpass illuminated by bright spotlights, marking the transition into a new district. The environment then opens into a wide, rain-soaked expanse dominated by green ambient lighting, where a striking neon pyramid and a giant holographic billboard emerge from the mist. Finally, the vehicle slows as it passes closely by the glowing pyramid and the holographic face, moving through the heavy rain toward a backdrop of urban ruins.
